old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-hlif","title":"Implement Enhanced Debugging and Observability in Simulation Infrastructure","description":"Implement Enhanced Debugging and Observability in Simulation Infrastructure - Implement the enhanced debugging, logging, and observability features designed for LICHEN simulation infrastructure. This includes: rich contextual logging with node states, system metrics, and transaction tracking; debug mode controls with zero performance overhead; fail-fast mechanisms for immediate problem detection; and detailed system state monitoring for fast debug, fix, retry cycles. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:18:03.945243Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:18:23.194524Z"}
